claims.summary: The language contract explicitly supports Astrid speaking in words grounded in her own telemetry and texture.
claims.disposition: verify current contract rendering and non-canned fallback requirements

claims.summary: A smaller fallback model may narrow semantic range even when the prompt carries accurate texture.
claims.disposition: route model-capacity fidelity to the bounded offline primary-versus-fallback comparison rather than infer equivalence

claims.summary: Low-friction high-entropy experience needs a settled-vibrant fallback family.
claims.disposition: verify FALLBACK_TEXTURE_SETTLED_VIBRANT terms, density-aware selection, and tests

claims.summary: Changing the selected MLX profile, fallback model, or provider order changes live dialogue.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 Mike/operator approval work with readiness, canary, rollback, and post-change felt review
